semantic.role: Feature request template for proposing new capabilities or workflow improvements.
responsibilities: Defines the structured fields for submitting a feature request: problem to solve, proposed solution, and alternatives considered.
Guides contributors to provide clear, actionable information for the project maintainers.
outOfScope: Bug reports, documentation improvements, or other issue types are not covered by this template.
Template does not handle general feedback or questions.

English.purpose: This document serves as the standard feature request template for the ArchSpine project. It ensures that all feature suggestions follow a consistent format, making it easier for maintainers to evaluate and prioritize proposals.
English.context_and_audience: The template is intended for contributors and users of ArchSpine who want to suggest new functionality or improvements to existing workflows. It is part of the project's issue-tracking system on GitHub.
key_takeaways: Use this template to propose a new feature or workflow enhancement.
Include the problem you are facing, your proposed solution, and workarounds you have tried.
Fill in the required fields to help maintainers understand the request clearly.

Simplified Chinese.purpose: 本文档是 ArchSpine 项目的标准功能请求模板，用以确保所有功能建议遵循统一的格式，从而方便维护人员评估和排序建议。
Simplified Chinese.context_and_audience: 该模板适用于 ArchSpine 的贡献者和用户，他们可以在此提出新的功能或改进现有工作流程。该模板是项目在 GitHub 上问题跟踪系统的一部分。
key_takeaways: 使用此模板提议新功能或工作流程改进。
请描述您遇到的问题、您提出的解决方案以及您尝试过的变通方法。
填写必填字段，以便维护人员清晰理解请求内容。
